name: Aviationstack Real-Time Flight Data API
what_it_does: Aviationstack real-time flight data REST API for travel apps, logistics platforms, and aviation services to access live flight tracking, historical flight records, airport information, airline data, and global aviation status — covering 13,000+ airlines and 10,000+ airports worldwide with real-time departure/arrival data, flight status, and route information. Enables AI agents to manage real-time flight status for travel notification automation, handle flight tracking for logistics coordination automation, access airport data for facility information automation, retrieve airline information for carrier details automation, manage historical flights for analytics automation, handle departure/arrival data for schedule management automation, access flight routes for itinerary planning automation, retrieve aircraft data for fleet information automation, manage flight delay for disruption management automation, and integrate Aviationstack with travel apps, trip planners, and corporate travel platforms for end-to-end aviation data automation.
use_cases: Tracking real-time flight status and delays for travel notification and disruption management automation agents
Accessing departure and arrival data for airport operations and logistics coordination automation agents
Retrieving historical flight records for aviation analytics and route performance reporting automation agents
Getting airline and airport reference data for travel booking platform enrichment automation agents
not_for: Ticketing or flight booking (Aviationstack is data only, not a booking platform)
Corporate travel policy enforcement (use Navan or TripActions for managed corporate travel)
ATC (Air Traffic Control) real-time radar (Aviationstack is schedule/status data, not raw ADS-B)
best_when: A travel app, logistics platform, or corporate travel tool wanting AI agents to access real-time flight status, airport data, and airline information through Aviationstack's global aviation data API.
avoid_when: FREE TIER HTTP ONLY: Aviationstack free tier uses HTTP (not HTTPS); automated HTTPS-only assumption on free tier creates connection error; automated production apps must upgrade to paid plan for HTTPS. REAL-TIME REQUIRES PAID PLAN: Aviationstack real-time flight tracking requires paid subscription; automated real-time on free tier creates delayed or historical data only; automated must upgrade for live tracking. DATA ACCURACY VARIES: Aviationstack aggregates data from multiple sources; automated perfect accuracy assumption creates occasional discrepancies with airline-direct data; automated should use authoritative airline sources for critical operations. RATE LIMITS ARE STRICT ON FREE TIER: Free tier has very low monthly call limit; automated high-frequency flight monitoring on free tier creates rapid quota exhaustion; automated must plan monthly call budget or upgrade.

auth.notes: Aviationstack uses API key in query parameter for authentication. REST API with JSON. Owned by apilayer (Vienna-based API company). Products: Real-time flights, historical flights, airport data, airline data, aircraft data, city data. SDKs: None official. 13,000+ airlines, 10,000+ airports. Free tier available (HTTP, limited calls). Paid plans add HTTPS, real-time, and higher call limits. Competes with FlightAware and AirLabs for aviation data.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free: 500 calls/month, HTTP only, no real-time; paid plans add HTTPS, real-time, higher limits
pricing.notes: Vienna AT (apilayer). Free tier available. HTTPS requires paid plan. Monthly call quotas.

performance.rate_limits: 500 calls/month (free) to 100,000+/month (enterprise); no webhooks — polling required

known_agent_gotchas: FREE TIER IS HTTP NOT HTTPS: Aviationstack free tier uses HTTP only; automated HTTPS assumption on free tier creates SSL connection failure; automated production apps must use paid plan for HTTPS (secure) endpoints

API KEY IN QUERY PARAMETER: Aviationstack uses access_key as URL query parameter (not header); automated Authorization header assumption creates 401; automated must append ?access_key=YOUR_KEY to all requests

REAL-TIME DATA REQUIRES PAID PLAN: Free tier returns scheduled/historical data only; automated live flight tracking on free tier creates schedule data not live position; automated real-time flight monitoring requires paid subscription

MONTHLY CALL QUOTA EXHAUSTION: Aviationstack uses monthly call quotas; automated high-frequency polling across many flights creates rapid quota exhaustion; automated must implement polling strategy within monthly budget

NO WEBHOOKS — POLLING REQUIRED: Aviationstack has no webhook capability; automated event-driven flight notification creates polling requirement; automated must schedule polling for flight status updates
agent_readiness.security_notes: Aviation data. GDPR. API key in query param. EU/AT. Flight and travel data. Free tier HTTP only.

security_score_components.security_notes: Aviation data. GDPR. API key in URL param. EU. Flight and airport data. Free tier HTTP.
